summary: Completed testing of XHR conversion fix for Stripe.js fetch() interception bug. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - login flow works with XHR-based authService, kiosk page loads with attract screen and Google Places search.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: All authService functions in api.js use xhrRequest helper (XHR) - NO fetch() calls
VERIFIED: Checkout.js has NO fetch() calls - setup-intent, saved cards, delete card all use XHR
VERIFIED: AuthContext.js uses XMLHttpRequest for token validation on load
NOTE: transferService.calculatePrice, calculatePreorderPrice, getTripTypes still use fetch() - this is OK because they run on Home/CarSelection pages where Stripe.js is NOT loaded
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing C# API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: XHR conversion fix verified. All fetch() calls on Checkout page converted to XMLHttpRequest to avoid Stripe.js body stream interception. Login flow works, kiosk page works with attract screen and Google Places search. Session expiry detection in AuthContext returns 401 and shows 'Session expirée' toast.

frontend_ui_tests.login_flow: PASSED - Login with garikgalstyan@gmail.com works, shows 'Hello, Garik' and 'Connexion réussie!' toast
frontend_ui_tests.kiosk_attract_screen: PASSED - Shows animated attract screen with 'Zont Transfer', 'Hotel Le Bristol Paris', 'TOUCHEZ POUR RESERVER'
frontend_ui_tests.kiosk_destinations: PASSED - Shows 6 destination cards (CDG T1/T2, Orly, Gare de Lyon/Nord, Disneyland) with prices
frontend_ui_tests.kiosk_google_places_search: PASSED - Search bar visible: 'Rechercher une autre destination...'
frontend_ui_tests.checkout_page: PASSED - Loads correctly, shows 'No booking data found' when no booking context

code_verification.fetch_calls_in_transferService: 3 (calculatePrice, calculatePreorderPrice, getTripTypes) - OK because these run on pages without Stripe.js
code_verification.xhr_in_AuthContext: YES - Uses XMLHttpRequest for token validation

notes.stripe_fix: The core fix converts all fetch() to XMLHttpRequest on Checkout page because Stripe.js monkey-patches window.fetch() for fraud detection, which corrupts the Response body stream
notes.external_api: C# API (api.zont.cab) handles authentication, booking, and pricing - all working correctly
notes.kiosk_api: Kiosk API fetches real-time prices from C# backend for 6 popular destinations
notes.no_mocked_apis: All APIs are real - no mocking
